function.name: search_by_content
function.description: Full text search across note content and title. Returns up to 10 matches. For multi filter queries combine this with the other search tools and intersect by path.

function.name: search_by_tags
function.description: Find notes matching every given tag (AND logic, case insensitive). Returns up to 10. Example: search_by_tags(tags=['nlp','python']) gives notes tagged both nlp and python.

function.name: search_by_date
function.description: Find notes created in a date range. For a single day, pass the same value as date_from and date_to.

function.name: get_note_by_path
function.description: Fetch one note's full content by exact path, for example research/Transformers.md.

path.description: File path relative to vault root.

function.name: get_note_by_title
function.description: Fetch one note by title (filename without .md). Spaces and underscores both work. Use this first when you need the path for get_outgoing_links.

title.description: For example Transformers or Self Attention.

function.name: get_outgoing_links
function.description: Notes the source note links to via [[wiki-links]]. Use this for 'what does X reference' or 'what does X build on'. Requires the path.

function.name: get_incoming_links
function.description: Notes that link to the given note (backlinks). Use this for 'what links to X', 'what references X', or 'what mentions X'. Pass the title without .md.

function.name: get_vault_stats
function.description: Total notes, count per folder, full tag list. Only for vault level questions.

function.name: get_recent_notes
function.description: Most recently modified notes, newest first.
